Pughaz Sharpu Gangu Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Vivek – Mervin, Vivek Siva & Mervin Solomon

Hey gammayila kallu
Mama cutting utta silakaapillu
Glassula saraku
En paera solli ulle yerakku
Quarter matter illa
Half thevayilla
Matta avanumna
Vangudu fulla
Mitta kisavulla
Maama missavulla
So so jolly dhan da pondicherry la

shaarpu gangu
Sarakka vaangu
Bodhai aana
Pothikinu aadu da ( 2 times)

Face-u fulla makeup pottu
Ponnu face book il pannudhu video chattu
Moonja paatha nallave illa
Andha shawlula mooduthu ennatha solla
Grakkiya vuttu dhinam ketkum dhan thuttu
Nee andha maari ponnungala oram dhaan kattu
Ponnaala vendhu nee ponaaka nondhu
Machan kai koduthu thookiduvaan ennaikum friendu

Madhichu vandhaaka madhipa kodupom da
Morachu paarthaaka moonja odaipom da
Enna aanalum piriya maatom da
Oore vandhaalum es aaga maatom da

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Sharpu Gangu'?

The song 'Sharpu Gangu' captures the essence of celebration and joy, reflecting a carefree and lively spirit.

What is the context of this song in the movie Pugazh?

In Pugazh, 'Sharpu Gangu' is featured during a festive moment, enhancing the fun and energetic atmosphere of the film.

Who are the artists behind this song?

The song is sung by Vivek Siva and composed by the duo Vivek – Mervin.

When was 'Sharpu Gangu' released?

'Sharpu Gangu' was released on August 12, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Sharpu Gangu' from the movie Pugazh is a lively and upbeat track that embodies the spirit of celebration. It showcases the joy of living in the moment, with catchy lyrics that invite listeners to dance and enjoy life. The energetic beats and vibrant vocals create an atmosphere of happiness and excitement, making it a perfect addition to any festive occasion. Overall, the song conveys a sense of carefree joy and the thrill of celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sharpu Gangu from Pugazh is a vibrant celebration of life that will get you on your feet! With the dynamic collaboration of Vivek Siva's lively vocals and the energetic beats crafted by Vivek – Mervin, this song is a perfect anthem for any party. Dive into the infectious rhythm and let the good vibes flow!
stanzaMeanings: Hey, in the village, uncle is cutting the stone, pouring the drink into the glass. I tell my name and they pour it inside. No need for a quarter, no need for half. If it's someone else, they take it fully. Uncle is not missing out, it's all so jolly in Pondicherry.
Sharpu Gangu, take the drink. It's a celebration, let's dance.

The face is fully made up, the girl is posting videos on Facebook. Seeing her face is not good. In that shawl, what can I say? Every day, I get asked about it. You are like those girls, showing off. If you want to go, you will be taken away, my friend will lift you up.
If you come in a rush, we will give you a chance. If you look closely, we will get into trouble. No matter what, we won't separate. Even if we come to the village, we won't change.
Sharpu Gangu, take the drink. It's a celebration, let's dance.

Hey, in the village, uncle is cutting the stone, pouring the drink into the glass. I tell my name and they pour it inside. No need for a quarter, no need for half. If it's someone else, they take it fully. Uncle is not missing out, it's all so jolly in Pondicherry.
Sharpu Gangu, take the drink. It's a celebration, let's dance.
